svg.title: Design A — Sequential Stepper reference wireframe sketch
svg.desc: Hand-drawn style wireframe showing stepper UI with step indicator, chart zone, narrative text zone, navigation buttons, thumbnail panels for steps 1 and 7, and a focus/parti diagram showing the step transition mechanism.
svg.text: LAYOUT — main interface (one screen at one moment)
[F] Vehicle ownership patterns across Victorian LGAs
FOCUS / PARTI — step transition mechanism (enlarged detail)
Each step reveals exactly one analytical layer. The reader cannot skip ahead, but
can revisit visited circles [A]. The closing step only makes sense once all prior
evidence has been absorbed — this is what separates Design A from B and C.
